title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Gateway Distriparks

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Gateway Distriparks
jsonLd.description:
Join the Gateway Distriparks family as a Logistics Manager in Howrah. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Gateway Distriparks:
Gateway Distriparks is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in TMS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gateway Distriparks!
